creator: franco.ricci@phys.uniroma1.it
text:
This link http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/ports.cgi?query=virtualbox&stype=all&sektion=emulators
reports a wrong version of virtulabox.
Link is about 4.1.22 version but svn repository http://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/emulators/virtualbox-ose/
is about 4.2.6

The same happens with CUPS port.


-------------------------

LabIT
